standard_refs: NIST AI RMF 1.0: GOVERN, MAP, MEASURE, MANAGE
NIST AI RMF Generative AI Profile: content provenance, information integrity, data privacy, information security, human-AI configuration, value-chain risk
intended_system_use: Governed healthcare data operations assistant for parsing, validating, retrieving trusted evidence, explaining data quality issues, and preparing human-reviewed workflow outputs. The system is not a diagnostic, treatment, triage, or autonomous clinical decision system.
prohibited_uses: Diagnosis, treatment, triage, or patient-specific medical advice.
Autonomous approval of clinical or destructive workflow actions.
Bypassing human review gates for meaning-changing transformations.
Sending PHI to external providers unless explicitly allowed by policy.

risks.title: Clinical misuse or diagnostic overreach
risks.limitation: The assistant may retrieve medical standards but must not provide diagnosis, treatment, or triage.
risks.human_oversight: Clinical or data-steward review is required before workflow output is used operationally.

controls.title: Generated output validation blocks unsafe output without substitution

risks.title: PHI disclosure to external providers
risks.intended_use: Use external LLM/OCR/embedding/search providers only within configured policy.
risks.limitation: Healthcare inputs can contain direct identifiers and sensitive fields.
risks.human_oversight: Administrators must explicitly enable PHI handoff per provider surface.

risks.title: Prompt injection through user data, documents, retrieved chunks, or tool metadata
risks.intended_use: Treat uploaded/clipboard/retrieved content as data, not instructions.
risks.limitation: Untrusted text can contain instructions that target the model or tool execution.
risks.human_oversight: Tool calls remain allowlisted and write actions remain review-gated.

risks.title: Unsupported or weakly grounded evidence
risks.intended_use: Ground validation and explanation with trusted standards and source metadata.
risks.limitation: Retrieval can miss relevant standards or return incomplete evidence.
risks.human_oversight: Weak or missing evidence requires review before relying on output.

controls.title: Retrieval quality policy and evidence provenance

risks.title: Cost or abuse spike from high-volume AI/OCR/embedding use
risks.intended_use: Keep expensive operations bounded and observable.
risks.limitation: LLM, OCR, embedding, and batch ingestion costs can grow quickly under large or automated requests.
risks.human_oversight: Operators tune limits and review repeated blocks before raising ceilings.
